question: What kind of entities are (1) God and (2) the devil?
correct: He is who He is, self-existent.
A created being, an angel that sinned.

question: (1) The Bible was given from whom to whom, (2) and why was it given?
correct: God gave the Bible to sinners.
To make known God who is life and the devil who is death.

question: (1) What kind of book is the Bible? Additionally, the promises within the (2) Old Testament and the (3) New Testament are between whom? Include one reference each.
correct: A covenant between God and the chosen people.
People at the time of Revelation's fulfillment, Lk 22:14-20, Rv 22:18-19.

question: (1) Who is the author of the Bible, and (2) how many writers are there? (3) What is God's purpose in giving the Bible? (4) How many books, chapters, and verses there are in the Old Testament and the New Testament, respectively.
correct: To give heaven and eternal life to whoever believes.
Old Testament: 39 books, 929 chapters, 23,144 verses; New Testament: 27 books, 260 chapters, 7,957 verses

question: (1) What are the 4 contents the Bible is divided into? (2) What is the process of how prophecies are fulfilled? Include one reference.
correct: History, moral teachings, prophecies, and fulfillment (physical fulfillment)

question: (1) Of the promises God made with Abraham, God promised that Abraham's descendants would come out of a country not their own (Genesis 15:13-14). When does this fulfill? (2) When did God fulfill the promises he made to the Old Testament prophets? (3) When will all the promises made during Jesus' first coming be fulfilled? Include one reference verse for each.
correct: At the time of Moses, Ex 12
At the time of Jesus' first coming, Jn 19:30

question: (1)What is considered true faith when the prophecies are fulfilled? (2)Include one reference verse.
correct: Faith that believes in the physical fulfillment according to the prophecies.

question: (1) The wars in the Old Testament and New Testament were between who and who? (2) Write the reason why both God and Satan went to war.
correct: The spirits and flesh belonging to God and the spirits and flesh belonging to Satan.
Satan: To not have the world be taken away.

question: Write the 7 eras that divide the flow of biblical history.
correct: Era of Creation → Era of Exodus and the Law → Era of the Judges → Era of the Kings → Era of the Prophets → Era of the Gospel of Heaven → Era of Revelation and Re-creation.

question: (1) What are the two reasons why Jesus spoke of the secrets of the kingdom of heaven in parables at the first coming? (2) What is the result of the one who does not perceive the parables? (3) When is the true meaning of parables clearly revealed? Include a reference verse each.
correct: To fulfill the prophecies spoken through the Old Testament prophets, to hide it from the enemy.
They do not receive atonement for sins and are not saved, Mk 4:10-12.
When the physical entities of the parables appear, Jn 16:25.

question: What are the true meanings of the figurative (1) seed, (2) field, (3) tree, (4) bird, (5) branch, (6) leaf, (7) fruit? (8)What does it mean to be given food at the proper time in Mt 24?
correct: Field = A person's heart, the world
Tree = The inner person born again with the seed of the Word (shepherd)
Fruit = Word, saint born through the Word
To testify to the fulfillment of prophecies.

question: What are the true meanings of the figurative (1)bowl, (2)scale (3)Rod(Staff), (4)Iron Scepter, (5)fire, (6)censer and incense, (7)Incense smoke, (8)pot.
What are the true meanings of the figurative (1) light and darkness, (2) lamp (lampstand), (3) blind and deaf, (4) and clothes/wedding clothes, (5)treasure, (6)rich?
correct: Word of life / ignorance of not having the Word.
Spirit and a person of duty.
One who does not perceive even when they see and hear the word.

question: What are the true meanings of the figurative (1) water, (2) spring, (3)river, (4)sea, (5)fisherman, (6)net, (7)fish, (8)ship.
What are the true meanings of the figurative (1)beast, (2)head, (3)horn, (4)tail, (5)blood and flesh of the Lamb?
correct: Person with authority who belongs to the head and fights.

question: What are the true meanings of the figurative (1)new wine, (2)new wineskin, (3)olive oil?
correct: The word of testimony of the witness.

question: What are the true meanings of the figurative (1)mountain, (2)rock, (3) idol, (4) seal, (5)trumpet sound, (6)song, (7)song of Moses, (8)song of the Lamb, (9)new song?
correct: The word of judgment and the shepherd with the authority to judge.
Words of the Old Testament Bible.
Words of the New Testament Bible.

question: What are the true meanings of the figurative (1)four living creatures, (2)wind, (3)breath of life, (4)death, (5)tomb, (6)resurrection, (7)bridegroom/bride, (8)widow, (9)orphan?
correct: State of the abscense of the word of life.
Living again through the word of life.
Congregant who belongs to the shepherd who betrayed.

question: What are the true meanings of the figurative (1)Jerusalem, (2)Babylon, (3)war, (4)heaven and earth, (5)sun, moon, and stars,(6)First Heaven and First Earth,(7)New Heaven and New Earth,(8)key of heaven, (9) key of hell?
correct: Tabernacle of the chosen people, people (saints).
Wisdom to know the secrets of heaven.
Wisdom to know the secrets of Satan.

question: (1) What is the meaning of Israel? (2) What are the 3 types of Israel, (3)What are the 3 types of Heaven?
correct: The one who overcomes, chosen people
Physical Israel, Spiritual Israel, New Spiritual Israel
Heaven in spiritual realm, the Tabernacle of the first chosen people, and the recreated  and sealed twelve tribes.
